resources.string: Driver is finishing last trip before picking you up
How would you like to ride?
Would you like to Tip your Driver
How much you rate your ride experience?
How much you rate your product experience?
Write us your ride experience. We are always happy to hear from you
Write us your product experience. We are always happy to hear from you
Search user by email or phone number
To start your driver journey, you have to add vehicle
We can get your vehicle details from a photo
Enter the email address or phone you used to register
By continuing, I confirm that I have read and agree to the {{_TERM_CONDITION}} and {{_PRIVACY_POLICY}}
You can add referral code provided by your friend here, to get free credits. If you do not have one or don\'t want to insert then just click on Skip button below.
Where did you want to go today?
We haven\'t expanded our fleet service in your country. Hope to see you soon
Share with friends and get extra referral credits
Update the App for better experience and bug fixes
Enter your old password to verify your account
Play sound when the driver has changed his status during booking
Sound play when driver has arrived
Are you sure you want to delete account?
Are you sure you want to quit the app?
Are you sure you want to remove this favourite?
Please enter your bid amount , so that you can get list of request from drivers near you.
Note: Search user by email or phone number (don’t add country code)
Do you want to go with fixed price else ride\nwith fare price
Are you sure you want to cancel the booking?
At times of intense demand, our rates may change to keep vehicles available.
Your friend has sent you split payment request
You need to pay above amount to your driver
This is just an estimated time. Actual fare may vary slightly based on traffic or discount
Applied promo code is valid and you have saved {{_AMOUNT}} on your current ride
Do you want to tie-up with corporate?
In which format would you like to upload your document?
In which format would you like to upload your profile?
Your account is blocked. Please\ncontact admin for support
Your account is declined. Please\ncontact admin for support
Would you wish to bid this booking?
Would you like to pay by corporate ?
Are you sure want to delete this address
Are you sure you want to delete {{_CARD_NUMBER}} card?
Your last booking payment is pending
Please wait while the admin assigns a route to your request. Once the route is set, you can proceed with the payment, and your booking will be confirmed after payment.
We’re sorry, there are no nearby drivers available at the moment. We appreciate your business, and we hope you’ll check back soon!
Are you sure you want to proceed?
It seems you permanently declined camera permission. You can go to the app settings to grant it.
This app needs access to your camera.
It seems you permanently declined location permission. You can go to the app settings to grant it.
This app needs access to your location.
It seems you permanently declined storage permission. You can go to the app settings to grant it.
This app needs access to your storage.
Contact your partner to add vehicle
Password and confirm password must be same
Please agree the terms and conditions to continue
Your payment has failed due to incorrect card or authentication, Please pay again or Add new card
Please select location within your country
Minimum redeem point value should be {{_MINIMUM_REDEEM_POINT}} points
Admin has rejected your document. Please re-uploaded your document
Your document has been expired. Please re-uploaded your document
Admin is reviewing your document. Please hold on for sometime
Pick-up and destination address must be different
Pick-up and stop address must be different
Stop address and drop off address must be different
Two consecutive stop addresses must be different
Select address from your current location country
Your corporate dose not have any active payment mode
{{_VALUE}} length must be less than {{_VALUE1}} characters
{{_VALUE}} length must be more than {{_VALUE1}} characters
{{_VALUE}} length must be less than or equal to {{_VALUE1}} characters
{{_VALUE}} length must be more than or equal to {{_VALUE1}} characters
{{_VALUE}} must be less than or equal to {{_VALUE1}}
{{_VALUE}} must be more than or equal to {{_VALUE1}}
Vehicle document is not approved by admin or document is expired.
Offer auto applied on the bill
Applied promo code is valid and you have saved {{_VALUE}} on your current order
You already added service from diffrent vehicle. do you want to clear cart and add for current vehicle?
Drop at my location after service
Only Delivery available in this location
Only Pickup available in this location
You are about to add an item from a different merchant to your cart. This will remove the items from your current cart. Do you want to continue?
You are about to add an item from a different category to your cart. This will remove the items from your current cart. Do you want to continue?
The category does not allow multiple services at a time
This location offers only on-site service
This location only offers service at home
This location offers only online services
Your address may vary based on the merchants near you
Waiting for the provider to accept your order.
You can only select up to {{_VALUE}} options
Only {{_VALUE}} units are allowed for this product
The store does not provide delivery at your location
Are you sure want to call SOS?
Pickup location must contain at least one parcel
Each location must have at least one pick/drop parcel
Some parcels are not assigned to any drop-off
Enter contact information to each location
